scenario.name: B2BUA topology hiding UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:bob@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 99 INVITE Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 65 User-Agent: SIPp/topology-test P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:alice@10.99.99.99> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=LeakyUA 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=LeakyUA c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:bob@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 99 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:bob@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 100 INVITE Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 65 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=LeakyUA 53655765 2353687638 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=LeakyUA c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:bob@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 100 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:bob@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 101 BYE Max-Forwards: 65 Content-Length: 0
